arxiv_papers.title: SAGER: Self-Evolving User Policy Skills for Recommendation Agent
arxiv_papers.summary: Large language model (LLM) based recommendation agents personalize what they know through evolving per-user semantic memory, yet how they reason remains a universal, static system prompt shared identically across all users. This asymmetry is a fundamental bottleneck: when a recommendation fails, the
arxiv_papers.cn_title: SAGER：推荐Agent的自演化用户策略技能
arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 基于大语言模型的推荐Agent通过演化每用户的语义记忆来个性化其所知内容，但其推理方式仍然是所有用户共享的通用静态系统提示。这种不对称性是一个根本性瓶颈：当推荐失败时，Agent无法从用户反馈中学习。本文提出SAGER框架，使Agent能够通过用户策略技能的自演化实现个性化推荐。

arxiv_papers.title: GenRec: A Preference-Oriented Generative Framework for Large-Scale Recommendation
arxiv_papers.summary: Generative Retrieval (GR) offers a promising paradigm for recommendation through next-token prediction (NTP). However, scaling it to large-scale industrial systems introduces three challenges: (i) within a single request, the identical model inputs may produce inconsistent outputs due to the paginat

arxiv_papers.summary: Recent advancements in multimodal recommendations, which leverage diverse modality information to mitigate data sparsity and improve recommendation accuracy, have gained significant attention. However, existing multimodal recommendations overlook the critical role of user representation initializati

arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 本文研究多模态推荐系统，提出新的注意力机制来提升推荐准确性。

arxiv_papers.title: Federated User Behavior Modeling for Privacy-Preserving LLM Recommendation
arxiv_papers.summary: Large Language Models have shown great success in recommender systems. However, the limited and sparse nature of user data often restricts the LLM's ability to effectively model behavior patterns. To address this, existing studies have explored cross-domain solutions by conducting Cross-Domain Recom

arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 本文在llm相关领域做出了创新研究，提出了新的方法和见解。

arxiv_papers.title: Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion
arxiv_papers.summary: Learning Path Recommendation (LPR) is critical for personalized education, yet current methods often fail to account for historical interaction uncertainty (e.g., lucky guesses or accidental slips) and lack adaptability to diverse learning goals. We propose U-GLAD (Uncertainty-aware Generative Learn

arxiv_papers.cn_summary: 本文研究个性化学习路径推荐，提出考虑历史交互不确定性的生成式方法。

daily_pick.title: 如何对于统计专业来说，哪个方向是核心?
daily_pick.summary:
BugBuster喵
查看知乎原文



说句得罪人的话，如果谁现在还在纠结数理统计 vs 应用统计，已经落后这个时代至少五年了。
我知道这个开头会让很多人不舒服。但请你耐心看完。
我本科统计，博士期间做因果推断，现在在业界做 AI 相关的工作。看到了太多统计专业的学生，花了四年甚至六年时间，学了一堆正确但过时的方向规划经验，毕业后发现自己两头不靠。

daily_pick.cn_title: Well Begun is Half Done：多模态推荐的无训练注意力机制
daily_pick.cn_summary: 多模态推荐的最新进展利用预训练模型提取物品的多模态特征，但现有方法在融合多模态信息时存在注意力机制设计不合理的问题。本文提出一种无需训练的注意力机制方法，通过精心设计的注意力权重显著提升多模态推荐的准确性。
